news.headline: Moët Hennessy sponsors event at Clark Atlanta University with Sir Davis Whiskey and Veuve Clicquot.
news.summary: Moët Hennessy USA is set to showcase Sir Davis Whiskey and Veuve Clicquot at a special event for Divine 9 alumni in Atlanta. The company will sponsor the Clark Atlanta University Panhellenic Council '99 Alumni 25th Year Anniversary Tailgate. This exclusive event is scheduled for October 10, 2024.

news.headline: FIBRA Prologis buys 0.4M sq ft in Tijuana for $63.7M ($155/sq ft). Leading owner of Class-A industrial real estate in Mexico.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in Mexico City, FIBRA Prologis announced the acquisition of a building in Tijuana from Prologis for US$63.7 million, equivalent to $155 per square foot. FIBRA Prologis is a prominent owner and operator of Class-A industrial real estate in Mexico, listed under BMV as FIBRAPL14. This strategic purchase showcases their commitment to expanding their presence in the industrial sector.

news.headline: EVERSANA partners with Oracle to innovate pharmacovigilance. Significant changes in global support model to meet industry needs.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, a major global commercialization services provider in the life sciences sector, EVERSANA, disclosed significant enhancements to its pharmacovigilance and drug safety services to address the industry's expanding requirements. These updates include various transformative elements aimed at fulfilling the increasing demands. The company, headquartered in Chicago, is taking proactive steps to adapt to the evolving landscape and enhance its offerings in this critical area.

news.headline: Medically Home appoints Pippa Shulman, DO, MPH as Chief Strategy Officer in addition to Chief Medical Officer role.
news.summary: In Boston on October 10, 2024, Medically Home disclosed the expansion of duties for Pippa Shulman, DO, MPH, their Chief Medical Officer. Medically Home, a company utilizing technology to deliver acute hospital care to patients at home, announced this transition. Dr. Shulman will take on the role of Chief, a move that signifies the company's strategic focus on enhancing medical services. This decision highlights Medically Home's commitment to advancing patient care under the leadership of Dr. Shulman, who boasts significant medical expertise.

news.headline: ASCAP Lab reveals teams for the 2024 AI and the Business of Music Challenge to explore industry tools.
news.summary: ASCAP's VERSED podcast in New York will delve into the advantages of music industry tools used by teams. Set to air in October 2024, the ASCAP Lab has unveiled the cohort for its 2024 AI and the Business of Music Challenge. This initiative aims to explore the intersection of artificial intelligence and the music business, offering a platform for individuals to collaborate and innovate. Through this challenge, participants will have the opportunity to enhance their understanding of how AI can revolutionize various aspects of the music industry.

news.headline: Fr8Tech regains Nasdaq compliance by meeting bid price requirement on Oct. 9, 2024, Stock symbol: FRGT.
news.summary: On October 9, 2024, Freight Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: FRGT), a logistics management innovation company, received written notice from Nasdaq that it regained compliance with the minimum bid price requirement set by Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). The company announced the resolution of this matter on October 10, 2024, stating that the issue is now closed.

news.headline: Definitive Healthcare introduces Market Forecast, offering 3, 5, and 10-year projections for strategic planning in healthcare.
news.summary: Market Forecast provides providers with long-term projections for three, five, and 10 years to enhance strategic planning for future demand and growth opportunities. This tool offers insights for market trends over a significant period, allowing businesses to make informed decisions based on forecasts.

news.headline: SUNation Energy partners with Empire Automotive Group to offer free Level 2 EV Chargers to customers buying electric vehicles.
news.summary: SUNation, a subsidiary of Pineapple, is offering free Level 2 EV Chargers to customers of Empire Automotive Group who buy electric vehicles.

news.headline: 1Password launches 1Password for Good, giving $50,000 to support youth in cybersecurity and tech.
news.summary: In Toronto, 1Password has launched a new initiative called 1Password for Good. As part of this program, the company has pledged to donate $50,000 to support youth in the fields of cybersecurity and technology.

news.headline: Leading carbon management platform, IN BOLD PRINT, raises $1 million in pre-seed funding, supporting SMBs in reporting carbon emissions. VC 414 leads round. Schreiber Foods and Palermo's also involved.
news.summary: In Chicago, the prominent carbon management platform catering to businesses of various sizes has successfully concluded a pre-seed funding round, securing an impressive $1 million. This financial milestone further emphasizes the company's vital role in assisting small to medium-sized enterprises within the consumer goods supply chain, especially amidst the growing necessity for carbon emissions disclosure. The funding round was spearheaded by VC 414, with other venture capital firms dedicated to enhancing climate solutions also participating. Noteworthy contributors to the funding include Schreiber Foods and Palermo’s.

news.headline: PatientFi and EngagedMD collaborate to improve fertility financing, aiming to educate clinics and patients, breaking financial barriers in treatment.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, PatientFi, a prominent fertility financing company, has officially revealed a new strategic alliance with EngagedMD, a patient engagement platform. This partnership aims to assist clinics in educating their patients about various financing options for fertility care. With the increasing demand for fertility treatments, this collaboration is set to confront key financial obstacles by enhancing clinic and patient education during the initial stages of treatment.

news.headline: Revlon appoints Michelle Peluso as CEO, effective Nov. 4, Elizabeth Smith as Executive Chair; Peluso to also join the Board.
news.summary: In New York, Revlon Group Holdings LLC revealed that Michelle A. Peluso is the new Chief Executive Officer, starting November 4. She will also become a member of the Company's Board of Directors. Elizabeth (Liz) A. Smith, who had been acting as interim CEO and Executive Chair since August 2023, will remain as Executive Chair. Peluso brings extensive global strategic and operational expertise to her new role.

news.headline: Fullscript, based in Ottawa, acquires Rupa Health to enhance its platform for whole person care.
news.summary: Healthcare technology company, Fullscript, has recently acquired Rupa Health as part of their strategy to enhance and grow their all-encompassing platform for holistic care. This acquisition aims to further strengthen Fullscript's offerings in the healthcare sector and expand their reach in the market. The move is set to propel Fullscript's growth trajectory, with the acquisition expected to bring significant value to the company. The deal is reflective of Fullscript's commitment to providing comprehensive solutions for whole person care and marks a significant milestone in their expansion efforts.

news.headline: Ulta Beauty launches digital platform - Ulta Beauty Community, The Joy Hub, The Joy Of... for World Mental Health Day.
news.summary: Ulta Beauty, based in Bolingbrook, Illinois, has introduced its latest digital platform, Ulta Beauty Community, along with two new wellness projects as part of The Joy Project. The Joy Hub, serving as a lively platform, offers uplifting content from the Ulta Beauty Joy Council. Moreover, The Joy Of... presents a fresh podcast delving into the connection between beauty and joy. As the nation’s largest beauty retailer, Ulta Beauty continues to expand its brand equity with these innovative initiatives aimed at enhancing customer experience.

news.headline: Drive Shack Inc. releases Q1 & Q2 financial results for 2024; reports available on OTC and investor relations websites.
news.summary: Drive Shack Inc. (OTC: DSHK) has disclosed its financial performance for the three months ending March 31, 2024, and the three and six months ending June 30, 2024. Interested individuals can access the results and corresponding quarterly reports on the OTC landing page (www.otcmarkets.com/stock/DSHK) and the Company’s investor relations website (https://ir.driveshack.com). Drive Shack Inc. is a prominent entity in the golf sector, recognized for its ownership and operation of golf-related ventures.

news.headline: Humana ranked #1 in customer experience among health insurers for the 4th year in a row in a survey of 12,372 consumers.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky, Humana has once again secured the top spot as the number one health insurer for customer experience, according to Forrester. This marks the fourth consecutive year that Humana has achieved this recognition. The latest proprietary survey conducted by Forrester in 2024 awarded Humana with the highest CX Index™ score among Health Insurers, based on feedback from 12,372 consumers who shared their opinions on experiences with 16 different brands. The CX Index™ score is a measure used by Forrester to evaluate and rank real customer experiences. This survey included input from over 98,000 customers in the United States across 223 brands.

news.headline: Parade debuts eDP Tcons for HDR gaming displays up to UHD resolution, including DP826/827/828 models.
news.summary: A new series of eDP Tcons optimized for HDR gaming displays up to UHD resolution has been introduced by Parade in San Jose, California. The DP826/827/828 offer advanced capabilities tailored for high-quality gaming experiences.

news.headline: SecTor 2024 keynote speakers announced: Leigh Honeywell, CEO of Tall Poppy, and Omkhar Arasaratnam, NYU lecturer. Event on Oct 22-24 in Toronto.
news.summary: A prominent cybersecurity conference in Canada, SecTor, revealed Leigh Honeywell, founder and CEO of Tall Poppy, and Omkhar Arasaratnam, Guest Lecturer at New York University (NYU) Tandon School of Engineering: Graduate School, as Keynote speakers for SecTor 2024. The event is scheduled to be held from October 22 to October 24 at the Metro Toronto Convention Centre in downtown Toronto. The Keynote speeches by the two speakers are set for Wednesday, October 23, and Thursday, October 24.

news.headline: North Dakota Pipeline Authority: As of this morning Oct. 10 oil production estimated to be down around 60,000-90,000 bpd due to ongoing wildfires.
Korea Zinc commits to shareholder value amidst MBK's takeover bid by proceeding with buyback of treasury shares.
news.summary: Seoul, South Korea - Korea Zinc has confirmed plans to move forward with the buyback and cancellation of treasury shares.

news.headline: G2 enhances capabilities for SaaS marketers to connect buyer activity to revenue through new integrations.
news.summary: In Chicago, G2, the leading software marketplace globally, introduced two new features to assist go-to-market teams in maximizing their G2 investment. These capabilities involve linking buyer actions on G2 with revenue results through collaborations with top marketing attribution providers and evaluating potential growth opportunities within the G2 marketplace. This empowers marketers to access crucial insights and advice for enhancing the effectiveness of their marketing strategies and investments.

news.headline: AnalytixInsight appoints Matthew Bosrock to Board of Directors in Toronto.
news.summary: In Toronto, it was announced that AnalytixInsight has appointed Matthew Bosrock to its board of directors. This addition brings the total number of board members to [specify exact number].

news.headline: Vespa.ai supports ColPali, an open-source retrieval model for visually rich documents. Reduces latency and improves accuracy.
news.summary: In Trondheim, Norway, Vespa.ai, a prominent developer of AI applications involving Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), unveiled support for ColPali, an open-source retrieval model specifically designed for visually-intensive documents like PDFs. This innovative model revolutionizes document retrieval by incorporating complete rendered documents, including visual components, into vector representations tailored for Large Language Models (LLMs). Such integration results in decreased latency, enhanced precision, and facilitates a more seamless retrieval process.

news.headline: Bond Touch 4 bracelet introduces sleek design & enhanced sensitivity, setting new standard in wearable tech.
news.summary: In Lisbon, Portugal, the company Bond Touch released the Bond Touch 4 bracelet, a product aimed at connecting people separated by distance. This new model, developed based on input from Bond Touch's worldwide community, boasts a more compact and stylish design as well as improved touch sensitivity technology. The Bond Touch 4 builds upon the popularity of their original Bond Touch Bracelet, setting a higher bar in wearable tech.

news.headline: Cloudflare appoints Chirantan Desai as President of Product & Engineering to boost growth to $5 billion in revenue.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET) has appointed Chirantan "CJ" Desai as President of Product & Engineering. With over 25 years of experience, Desai's expertise in product innovation, go-to-market strategies, and operational efficiency is expected to boost the company's growth towards achieving $5 billion in annual recurring revenue and beyond. His focus on building high-performing teams and driving sustained business growth aligns with the company's goal of expanding and excelling in the connectivity cloud sector.

news.headline: WellSky report reveals rising referral volumes, longer hospital stays, & persistent staffing challenge in post-acute care.
news.summary: In Overland Park, Kansas, recent data analysis from WellSky reveals concerning trends in post-acute care. Referral volumes are on the rise, indicating increased demand for services. Additionally, the average length of hospital stays has extended, suggesting more severe cases or bottlenecks in transitioning patients to post-acute care settings. Furthermore, the sector is facing an ongoing staffing challenge, highlighting the need for workforce solutions to meet the growing demands. This data underscores the critical importance of addressing these issues to ensure quality care for patients in need.

news.headline: Only 20% of Gen Z saving for retirement due to rising living costs and lack of financial advice.
news.summary: Concerns have arisen as Generation Z finds it challenging to connect retirement with their desired financial independence, primarily due to increasing living expenses and a deficiency in trustworthy financial guidance. In a report dated October 10, 2024, in New York, it was noted that Gen Z, unlike their predecessors, has extensive financial resources at their disposal. However, despite this, many individuals from this generation are struggling to envision a secure retirement plan due to the mounting costs of living and a scarcity of reliable financial advice.

news.headline: Saks releases annual Impact Report on World Mental Health Day, announcing recipients of 2024 local grant program.
news.summary: Local grant recipients for 2024 were recently announced by a foundation in New York. The Saks Fifth Avenue Foundation celebrated World Mental Health Day by publishing its Impact Report for the year, showcasing the organization's progress in supporting mental health initiatives. The report illustrates the foundation's achievements throughout the year, emphasizing its dedication to advancing mental health causes.

news.headline: Postman to host free webinar "Unlocking AI's Potential with APIs" on Oct 24 at 9 am PDT. Learn maximizing API success and developer experience in AI era.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Postman, a prominent API collaboration platform, is set to conduct a free webinar titled “Unlocking AI's Potential: Why the Future Depends on APIs” on October 24 at 9 a.m. PDT / 12 p.m. EDT. This virtual event aims to highlight the essential elements for optimizing API product performance, enhancing collaboration efficiency, and ensuring an exceptional developer experience in the AI era. The webinar will delve into the crucial role of APIs in adapting to the evolving landscape influenced by AI.

news.headline: Bush's Beans introduces Slow-Simmered White Chili Magic Chili Starter for white chicken chili in under 30 mins.
news.summary: A new chili starter has been introduced by Bush's® Beans in Knoxville, Tennessee. This innovative product promises to deliver homemade-quality white chicken chili in under 30 minutes. The Slow-Simmered White Chili Magic® Chili Starter offers a magically easy cooking experience - Just Chop. Drop. Chili! This convenient option is set to provide a quick meal solution any day of the week. The launch took place on October 10, 2024, as per PRNewswire. This new offering aims to streamline the cooking process and cater to the fast-paced lifestyles of consumers.

news.headline: SambaNova partners with Canvass to offer AI solutions in South Asia & EMEA, aimed at fast adoption of modern AI tech.
news.summary: SambaNova, a cutting-edge AI company based in Palo Alto, California, has teamed up with Canvass AI, an enterprise solutions leader, to promote rapid adoption of AI Solutions in South Asia and EMEA regions. As per Su Le, Chief Growth Officer of SambaNova, the collaboration aims to address the accelerating demand for AI initiatives among businesses. This partnership will focus on offering vertically-integrated AI solutions, specifically in inference and training. SambaNova, known for its high-speed models and advanced chips, is committed to providing innovative AI technologies to meet the evolving market needs for artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Trade Nation launches US Presidential Election campaign 'Make Trading Great Again' to combat market volatility with low-cost fixed spreads.
news.summary: London, October 10, 2024 - Trade Nation, a fintech and financial services provider regulated by the FCA and recognized for its excellence, has revealed plans to kick off a campaign centered around the upcoming US Presidential Election*. The campaign, titled 'Make Trading Great Again'**, will be launched alongside its regular services.

news.headline: EP Wealth Advisors partners with Opto Investments, enhancing private markets access for clients through tech.
news.summary: EP Wealth Advisors, a prominent independent registered investment adviser headquartered in Torrance, California, has revealed a strategic collaboration with Opto Investments. Opto, a technology-driven platform, broadens private markets access for independent investment advisors. Through this partnership, EP Wealth aims to enhance its client services by offering a scalable, digital-focused solution featuring top-tier private investment opportunities. The collaboration signifies EP Wealth's commitment to expansion and innovation in the financial industry.

news.headline: XTI Aerospace releases V1.9 of Flight Transition Simulator for TriFan 600 aircraft on Oct. 10, 2024. Company is listed on NASDAQ as XTIA.
news.summary: XTI Aerospace, Inc., based in Englewood, Colorado, revealed the launch of software version 1.9 for its Flight Transition Simulator. The Company, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol XTIA, is known for creating the innovative TriFan 600 aircraft. The software update is set to enhance the simulation experience for users. This advancement marks a significant step forward for XTI in its efforts to revolutionize the aerospace industry.

news.headline: OMNY Health appoints new Chief Commercial Officer after one billion patient encounters milestone. Weng from Komodo Health.
news.summary: In Atlanta, OMNY Health, a healthcare ecosystem specializing in cross-industry data sharing, has revealed its first c-suite expansion since 2021. Dr. Ivy Weng, previously the Group Vice President of Life Sciences at Komodo Health, has been appointed as the Chief Commercial Officer. This news follows a major achievement for OMNY Health, reaching one billion patient encounters. This milestone has influenced the care outcomes of millions of patients. Dr. Weng's role will encompass overseeing OMNY H... (remaining characters: 434)

news.headline: National campaign launched to fight diabetes stigma with comedy. Spoonful of Laughter aims to educate and empower; targets harmful stereotypes.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, in San Francisco, a nationwide campaign called The Spoonful of Laughter is leveraging comedy to raise awareness about diabetes. The initiative aims to combat negative stereotypes and stigma surrounding the condition while highlighting genuine, respectful, and empowering portrayals of individuals managing diabetes. This effort seeks to reach a broad audience and address misconceptions about diabetes, with a focus on increasing understanding and support for the 34.2 million Americans currently affected by the disease.

news.headline: - Amazon's Prime Big Deal Days was its biggest October shopping event ever, according to the company.- Key information: Prime Big Deal Days event.- Location: Seattle.- Source: BUSINESS WIRE.
news.summary: Amazon has revealed that Prime Big Deal Days marked its most successful October shopping event to date.

news.headline: Go Global Retail acquires HATCH Collection, a premium maternity brand, expanding market reach. Los Angeles, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: An important strategic move has been made by Go Global Retail as they recently finalized the acquisition of HATCH Collection, a prominent player in the premium maternity fashion and lifestyle sector. The acquisition is aimed at expanding their market reach and enhancing their portfolio. This significant investment marks a step towards strengthening Go Global's presence in the industry. This deal was completed on October 10, 2024, without mentioning the exact numbers involved in the acquisition.

news.headline: Paychex declares $0.98 per share dividend, payable on Nov 27, 2024, to shareholders of record as of Nov 7, 2024. Paychex serves 745,000+ customers.
news.summary: Rochester, N.Y. - The Board of Directors of Paychex, Inc. has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.98 per share for Paychex common stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on November 27, 2024, to shareholders of record as of November 7, 2024. Paychex, Inc. (Nasdaq: PAYX) is a top Human Capital Management company offering various services in HR, employee benefits, insurance, and payroll. With over 745,000 customers, Paychex is a leader in the industry.

news.headline: DuPont honors leaders Dr. Deyan Wang and Nicholas Sands for innovation, business impact with promotion to highest technical level.
news.summary: DuPont, a leading company in Wilmington, Delaware, recently honored Dr. Deyan Wang and Nicholas Sands for their remarkable contributions to innovation and business success. Both individuals attained the highest technical level within the company. This recognition was announced on October 10, 2024, through a press release by DuPont. The company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol DD, highlighted the significant achievements of these leaders in their careers.

news.headline: Anthology wins 2024-2025 Microsoft Inner Circle award for sales and innovation. -143 characters
news.summary: A leading educational technology company, Anthology, based in Boca Raton, Florida, has been recognized by Microsoft for its exceptional sales performance and innovative practices. The company has been chosen for the prestigious Microsoft Inner Circle for Business Applications 2024-2025 program. This achievement highlights Anthology's outstanding accomplishments and is a testament to their dedication to excellence in the industry.

news.headline: Sleep Number marks World Menopause Day with Hot Flash Sale, offering special deals on products addressing temperature fluctuations for better sleep quality. 90 characters.
news.summary: Sleep Number Corporation, a Nasdaq-listed company, marked World Menopause Day on October 18 by launching a "Hot Flash Sale" campaign. The initiative aims to highlight the connection between temperature, menopause, and sleep quality, emphasizing the significance of addressing these factors for menopausal individuals. The sale includes discounted rates on the company's range of products designed to manage temperature fluctuations during sleep. This promotion underscores the brand's commitment to enhancing the quality of sleep for individuals experiencing menopause.

news.headline: Presidio acquires Internetwork Engineering, expanding tech services in Southeast U.S. based on recent news release.
news.summary: Presidio has announced the expansion of its technology services and solutions in the Southeast U.S. following the acquisition of Internetwork Engineering. This move signifies Presidio's strategic growth in the region, allowing them to further enhance their offerings to clients. The acquisition is set to provide access to a broader client base in the Southeast U.S., strengthening Presidio's position in the market. This development underscores Presidio's commitment to growth and innovation in the technology sector, showcasing their dedication to providing top-notch services in the region.

news.headline: Chamère introduces US launch of ready-to-drink Kir Royale can inspired by Emily in Paris, combining Parisian chic & charm.
news.summary: This fall, the collaboration between Chamère and Emily in Paris introduces a new ready-to-drink Kir Royale can to the US market. The blend promises to encapsulate Parisian chic and whimsical charm, offering a delightful taste of French sophistication. Consumers can elevate their experiences with this product, combining the essence of Parisian style with a touch of elegance.

news.headline: JanSport launches Retro Series with 1967 designs at $19.67 on JanSport.com and Tillys.com for limited time.
news.summary: A nostalgic collection featuring classic 1967 JanSport designs has been released, priced at $19.67 and can be purchased on JanSport.com and Tillys.com. This limited-time offering aims to revive the iconic styles of the past. JanSport, a long-standing favorite brand among the youth, is reconnecting with its origins through this reimagined vintage line. The collection is drawing attention from fans of the brand, with the retro pricing adding to its appeal. The release took place in Denver on October 10, 2024, marking a significant moment for JanSport as they celebrate their heritage with this special initiative.

news.headline: YMCA marking World Mental Health Day, promoting connection and support. Y-USA supports 2,600+ YMCAs in US. #mentalhealth #awareness.
news.summary: The YMCA of the USA, acting as the national resource office for over 2,600 YMCAs nationwide, is uniquely positioned to provide support for mental health within the community. On World Mental Health Day, which falls on October 10, 2024, the organization in Chicago aims to raise awareness about mental health issues.

news.headline: Harlequin and Centinel Media to release 28 romance movies over 3 years, with 6 coming in 2025.
news.summary: Harlequin, the well-known romance publisher, has partnered with Centinel Media to enhance the Harlequin universe by releasing a total of 28 movies over the next three years. Of these, six movies are scheduled to be launched in 2025. The collaboration between Harlequin and Centinel Media aims to expand the reach of the Harlequin brand and bring new cinematic experiences to audiences. This strategic partnership between the two companies signifies a significant step in the evolution of the Harlequin entertainment landscape.

news.headline: Ask Sage is first AI platform to achieve IL5 authorization from DISA, enabling DoD access.
news.summary: A company based in Arlington, Virginia called Ask Sage, Inc. has become the pioneer in Generative AI platforms for government and regulated industries. They made an announcement that they have been granted the Impact Level 5 (IL5) Provisional Authorization (PA) from the Defense Information Systems Agency (DISA). This authorization makes Ask Sage the first Generative AI platform to achieve this level, allowing them to offer immediate and smooth access to the U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) and the Defense Industrial Base. This move is significant as it unlocks the adoption of Generative AI by these sectors.

news.headline: SS&C Technologies extends transfer agent relationship with abrdn, a global investment company. Oct. 10, 2024. Nasdaq: SSNC.
news.summary: In Windsor, Connecticut on October 10, 2024, SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. declared that abrdn, the worldwide investment firm and asset manager, has lengthened its ongoing transfer agency partnership with SS&C Global Investor and Distribution Solutions (GIDS). The announcement solidifies a significant deal for Nasdaq-listed SSNC as it continues to collaborate with abrdn on transfer agency services. This move highlights the strategic alliance between the two companies and reinforces their commitment to providing reliable investor and distribution solutions.

news.headline: Conti Federal secures $31.7M contract to build B-21 Fuel Cell Hangar at Ellsworth AFB, their fifth project for the bomber.
news.summary: Conti Federal Services, a prominent construction and engineering company focusing on military construction and critical infrastructure for the U.S. federal government, has secured a significant contract worth $31.7 million. The contract involves the renovation and transformation of Dock 81 into Fuel Cell Hangar B7242 at Ellsworth Air Force Base in Rapid City, South Dakota. This project is specifically aimed at supporting the B-21 Raider aircraft. Notably, this contract marks the company’s fifth project related to the B-21 Raider aircraft. The contract was awarded by the U.S. Army.
